name: s3
title: AWS S3
description: Interact with AWS S3 using the S3 REST API: buckets, objects, presigned URLs, and multipart uploads.

access_key_id.label: Access Key ID
access_key_id.help: AWS Access Key ID with S3 permissions.

secret_access_key.label: Secret Access Key
secret_access_key.help: AWS Secret Access Key corresponding to the Access Key ID.

region.label: Region
region.help: AWS region where your primary buckets live (e.g. us-east-1, eu-west-1).
